title: 怪屋
summary:
Josephine tells Charles that if she were to reveal a secret, she would do so dramatically by identifying a murderer. Edith de Havilland interrupts the conversation and instructs Josephine to clean herself, preparing to take the girl to Larchmont Market for soda sundaes. Edith directs Charles to accompany them. After Josephine changes, Sophia expresses concern regarding Charles's presence and Josephine's plan to eat ice cream in the cold.

As they prepare to depart, Edith has Evans bring the Ford car. During the preparations, Charles notices boxes with blue labels in the hallway, which makes him uneasy. Before leaving, Edith kisses Sophia and tells her that some things must be endured. Once Edith and Josephine drive away, Charles and Sophia discuss the danger Josephine faces. Charles reveals that a bottle of digitoxin, which Edith uses for heart disease, is empty, suggesting someone may have found a hidden key. Charles expresses a desire to prevent Roger and Clementine from leaving, while Sophia describes feeling as though she is trapped in a nightmare.

After an ambulance departs with the deceased nanny's body for an autopsy, Charles and Sophia return to the house as darkness falls. They find the house occupied by a distressed maid and Margda, who questions why Edith and Josephine have been gone so long. Charles seeks out Tavener to express his concerns. While waiting, Eustace suggests the women may have gone to the cinema, but Charles suspects Edith may have taken Josephine to a hotel or London for safety. At 6:45, Tavener arrives with news that a driver reported seeing a Ford car similar to theirs leaving the main road and heading into the woods.
